coveo:metadata.mgnlpagedescription: In senior living, every decision affects operations. Operators continue to face rising acuity, labor shortages, and pressure to stay competitive. While many turn to staffing models or technology, one
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: In senior living, every decision affects operations. Operators continue to face rising acuity, labor shortages, and pressure to stay competitive. While many turn to staffing models or technology, one of the most powerful and often underused drivers of efficiency is the built environment.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: How To Evaluate Robotics Like A Core Service In Senior Living
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead:
Most robotics pilots stall because leaders buy a device, then hope the operating model appears.
When daily workflows become harder to staff, small gaps turn into big problems. Standards slip. Overtime climbs. Leaders spend time filling holes instead of improving performance. The fastest path to results is redesigning one repeatable workflow so it runs with less friction and more consistency.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Designing Spaces that Build Trust: Elevating Resident and Family Confidence Through Self-Guided Engagement
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Trust is built through everyday experiences. In Senior Living, residents and families gain confidence when environments feel intuitive, welcoming, and designed to support independence. Spaces that encourage self-guided activities help residents stay engaged on their own terms while giving families reassurance that meaningful experiences are always within reach.

coveo:metadata.mgnlresourcetopicsnames: Designer Link;Professional Services;Equipment & Furnishings;Capital Planning;Impressions;Design & Procurement;Construction
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Designing spaces that keep residents engaged: Elevating connection and retention in Senior Living
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Resident engagement is one of the strongest indicators of satisfaction, well-being, and long-term retention in Senior Living. When residents feel connected to their community, they are more likely to participate, build relationships, and view the space as home.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: To all those who care for seniors: THANK YOU!
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Senior Living is changing rapidly and so are the challenges, but the constant is you – clinicians, nurses, therapists, leaders in care – all dedicated to championing quality of life for seniors. What you do is amazing and profoundly important. Thank you!

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Bringing farm to table to your community
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: More and more senior living communities are invigorating mealtimes through sustainable choices and healthier options.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: 2026 DSSI™ Forum Recap: Taking the Next Step in Spend Management
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: At the 2026 DSSI Forum event in Bonita Springs, FL, the message was clear: the time to evolve is now. Cost pressure is real. Labor is tight. Senior living operators need systems that actively prevent the wrong spending and make the right decisions easier.

coveo:metadata.mgnlresourcetopicsnames: Designer Link;Professional Services;Equipment & Furnishings;Capital Planning;Impressions;Design & Procurement;Construction
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Designing resident rooms for faster turns: How thoughtful design supports efficiency in Senior Living
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Resident rooms are one of the most operationally intensive spaces in Senior Living. Every move-out, refresh, and move-in directly affects staff time, maintenance resources, and occupancy timelines. When room turns are slow or complicated, the impact is felt across the entire community.

coveo:metadata.mgnlresourcetopicsnames: Designer Link;Professional Services;Equipment & Furnishings;Capital Planning;Impressions;Design & Procurement;Construction
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Designing Salons that Do More: Elevating the Senior Living Salon Experience
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: In Senior Living, salons are a requirement in nearly every community, yet they’re often treated as an afterthought: tucked away, minimally furnished, and designed for basic function rather than experience. With intentional design, however, salons can do much more: support resident dignity, foster social connection, and create opportunities for additional services and revenue, transforming a required space into a meaningful amenity that delivers value for residents, staff, and operators alike.

coveo:metadata.mgnlresourcetopicsnames: Designer Link;Professional Services;Equipment & Furnishings;Capital Planning;Impressions;Design & Procurement;Construction
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: When You Can’t Wait: Solving Procurement Delays in Senior Living
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Procurement teams juggle rising costs, tight timelines, and urgent requests from across their communities. When furniture delays a resident's move-in or leaves a common area out of date, the impact is immediate. Staff feel the strain, and residents miss out on the comfort and connection they deserve.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Robotics in Senior Living in 2026: What Scales, What Stalls, and What to Do Next
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead:
Senior Living leaders face a constant push for higher consistency with fewer available hands. Staffing volatility, rising wage pressure, and elevated expectations from residents and families create real strain across daily operations. Those pressures show up in predictable places: uneven standards, overtime spikes, and leaders spending time filling gaps instead of improving performance.
That is where robotics is gaining ground. In 2026, the most successful care environments will use robotics as a program, with defined ownership, measurable results, and operational impact.

coveo:metadata.mgnlresourcetopicsnames: Designer Link;Professional Services;Equipment & Furnishings;Capital Planning;Impressions;Design & Procurement;Construction
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Design that Brings Families Together: The Value of Family Dining in Senior Living
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: In Senior Living, dining is more than a meal. It is one of the most visible touchpoints for residents, families, and prospective move-ins. While operators often focus on menu quality and service models, the physical environment plays an equally important role in shaping the dining experience, especially when it comes to family dining.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Designing Outdoor Spaces That Restore: Elevating Connection to Nature in Senior Living
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Access to nature is more than an amenity in Senior Living. It is a powerful driver of well-being, connection, and quality of life. Outdoor spaces give residents opportunities to slow down, socialize, and reconnect with familiar routines that support both physical and emotional health.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead:
Behind every great resident experience is a network of seamless operations, from foodservice and housekeeping to procurement and beyond. Each element contributes to the resident satisfaction that defines a thriving senior living community.
When operations run smoothly, care teams can focus more time on residents. When they do not, the ripple effects are immediate, impacting resident experiences, staff morale, and financial performance. coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Range: equipment selection checklist
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Always get equipment specifications before purchasing. Specifications include power requirements, space limitations, ventilation needs, and available accessories. Ranges must always go under a hood.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Combi oven equipment selection checklist
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Always obtain the equipment specifications before purchasing. Specifications include power requirements, space limitations, ventilation needs, and available accessories. Most combi ovens need to go under a hood; boilerless options rated as ventless should be approved by the local fire marshal.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Ice machine equipment selection checklist
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Always obtain equipment specifications before purchasing. Specifications include power requirements, space limitations, ventilation needs, and available accessories. Proper water treatment and regular filter replacement can prevent 60-70% of ice machine service issues.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Steamer equipment selection checklist
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Get equipment specifications before purchasing. Specifications include power requirements, space limitations, ventilation needs, and available accessories. Most steamers need to go under a hood; this varies by unit and local Fire marshal approval.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Reach-in refrigerator & freezer equipment selection checklist
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Always get equipment specifications before purchasing. Specifications include power requirements, space limitations, ventilation needs, and available accessories. Traditional convection ovens must always go under a hood; smaller ventless options need local fire marshal approval.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Food processor equipment selection checklist
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: When purchasing any type of equipment, always obtain the equipment specifications. Specifications spell out power requirements, space limitations, ventilation needs, and available accessories. Your account manager can provide specifications once you select a unit. Food processors save money by reducing manual food prep labor and improve food quality by processing consistent batches.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: How AI is shaping the future of building operations in assisted and independent living
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: In assisted and independent living, comfort drives satisfaction. To stay ahead, communities are embracing AI and automation, not only to improve daily comfort, but to manage costs more effectively and give staff the tools to lead with confidence.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: How AI is transforming building operations in skilled nursing
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead:
In skilled nursing, systems in your buildings are the backbone of care. When HVAC, plumbing, or water safety systems fail, the impact goes far beyond comfort; it can jeopardize survey readiness, compliance, and safety.
That’s why more providers are exploring AI in building operations and automation tools that simplify monitoring, documentation, and preventive maintenance. The growing use of AI is helping teams predict failures before they occur and automate compliance tasks that once took hours.
Artificial intelligence in senior living operations is no longer just theory; it’s showing measurable benefits in long-term care environments.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: How AI is shaping the future of assisted living and memory care
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is quickly emerging as an essential resource, and its capabilities are expanding to enhance resident care and support caregivers in assisted living and memory care communities. Yet, there are growing concerns about AI and technology in the industry, particularly around how they may impact roles, relationships, and the human touch. At Direct Supply, we understand these concerns. We believe AI’s true value is in complementing and enhancing compassion and personalized care that make senior care truly exceptional.

AI is beginning to play an increasingly supportive role, with new capabilities emerging that enhance, and may soon further transform, the human elements essential to exceptional clinical care.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagetitle: Robotics in senior care: automating tasks, supporting caregivers, and preparing for the future
coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead:
Senior living is facing a historic shift. The U.S. is aging faster than the workforce can keep up. This “care gap” is creating urgent pressure on communities. Rising costs, staffing shortages, and increasing demand for compassionate care all collide in ways that can feel overwhelming. But innovation in healthcare technology offers a path forward.
One of the most promising solutions? Robotics and task automation.

To remain relevant and effective, senior living operators must embrace human-centered design and develop communities that support holistic wellness, independence, and purpose.

coveo:metadata.mgnlpagelead:
Medicaid funding cuts in 2025 are creating significant challenges across senior living, threatening not only the cost of senior care but also access, provider reimbursement, and long-term sustainability. As funding structures shift and pressures rise, the potential impact on individuals receiving care, and the teams supporting them, is substantial.
Direct Supply is committed to helping providers navigate this uncertainty, advocating for fair, sustainable policy, delivering cost-saving strategies, and scaling forward-thinking technology to support operational efficiency, financial stability, and better outcomes across care environments.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply® Attendant® Voice Alarm
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The Direct Supply Attendant Voice alarm provides the most options for noise control as well as managing your pad inventory. Along with alarm delay and nurse call connectivity, this alarm allows you to record customized messages or tones and also features a special "change pad" LED indicator on the top of the alarm. When used with Direct Supply's special "timed/breakaway" pads, this light will automatically track pad life.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply® Attendant® Deluxe Alarm
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Along with the features you'll find in the Direct Supply Attendant Economy alarm, the Direct Supply Attendant Deluxe alarm provides additional options for noise control, including alarm delay and nurse call connectivity. First, a delay switch allows caregivers to delay alerts for 0, 1, or 2 seconds after the resident has removed pressure from the pad, reducing false alarms due to repositioning as opposed to falling. Second, a nurse call jack in the bottom of the alarm can connect to most hardwired nurse call bed stations using a splitter and cable adapter to allow the alert to be sent through your call light system.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply Careers
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply employees share how innovative, inclusive workspaces foster collaboration, experimentation, and purpose-driven work. As an employee-owned, AI-first company, we’re using technology to make a meaningful impact in senior living — while supporting great work-life balance and a mission that truly matters.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply Clinical Leadership Conference
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This event was recorded August 18, 2021 and features: Welcome - Liz Jensen Infection Prevention and Control from a Clinical Expert - Dr. Patricia Stone How Technology Impacts the Clinical Infection and Prevention Practices Today and in the Future - Justin Smith Breakout Sessions Introduction - Liz Jensen Networking Breakout Sessions (not recorded) Save The Date & Closing - Liz Jensen Notice: This video is intended to provide information to Direct Supply’s customers, does not constitute medical or legal advice, and is not intended for use in the diagnosis or treatment of individual patients or conditions, or as a substitute for the advice of a licensed medical professional. coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: A Recap of Direct Supply's 2024 Community Involvement Program
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply’s Partners enjoy promoting worthy causes and taking advantage of opportunities to give back through active participation. A company is nothing without its people, and our Partners bring the passion they have for making a difference to Direct Supply and our community. Our involvement with dozens of community organizations is a direct result of our Partners’ dedication to various volunteer efforts. Presented here is a year in review of our Community Involvement initiatives from 2024.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Thoughtfully designed furniture that seamlessly blend style and functionality to meet the unique needs of Senior Living – it's what we call Function by Design.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Impressions Catalog: The Game is changing - take control of your CapEx expenditure with smarter, faster solutions
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Capital spend is like a game of chess. Every move counts, and every strategy is uniquely yours. That’s exactly why we’re here: to help you master your endgame.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: 2026 Capital Planning Tips and Resources
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This resource highlights key takeaways from the August Capital Planning webinar—including stats on inflation, HVAC cost increases, and project delays. See how TELS Platform can help speed up approvals and centralize planning,

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Prevent recliner tipping in Senior Living: Discover the SteadyTech™ anti-tip device from Maxwell Thomas®

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This webinar was broadcast live on March 13, 2024 and features Meagan Pollak-Harrison: Senior Spend Management Consultant - Direct Supply, Catrisse Alvord, MS, RD, LD: Director of Food Hospitality & Nutrition - Mission Health Communities, Zac Selmon: Director of Product Management - Brava, and Travis Rea: Vice President Sales & Marketing - Brava

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: DS Smart Kit Checklist
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Use this checklist to confirm all equipment has arrived and is properly set up before training. Verify all equipment on hand is correct and assembled prior to training day.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Cultivating a culture of safety for improved outcomes

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Safe Resident Transfer & Mobility Assessment
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Cultivate Safety with a Safe Resident Transfer & Mobility Program

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Safe Resident Transfer & Mobility Quick-Reference Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Acuity is rising and mobility is decreasing in Assisted Living. We’ll help make sure you’re prepared.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply® Zero Opening Bed Assist for Residential Beds
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Introducing the Direct Supply® Zero Opening Assist for Residential Beds! Compatible with a variety of residential bed frames, this unique bed assist device features a sleek, slim profile and can be used in a number of ways to aid your residents and staff. What’s more, this bed assist for seniors offers no risk of resident entrapment or restraint for increased peace of mind.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Zero Opening Bed Assist from Direct Supply
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Introducing the Direct Supply® Zero Opening Assist for Residential Beds! Compatible with a variety of residential bed frames, this unique bed assist device features a sleek, slim profile and can be used in a number of ways to aid your residents and staff. What’s more, this bed assist for seniors offers no risk of resident entrapment or restraint for increased peace of mind.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Introducing the Direct Supply Panacea Embrace Senior Mattress
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Learn more about the affordable memory foam Panacea Embrace mattress. The Panacea Embrace Healthcare Foam Mattress is a helpful product for senior sleep support and comfort. Unlike the typical costly and warm to sleep in foam mattress, this modernized mattress solution helps take senior care to the next level with optimized comfort and value features.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Introducing Direct Supply Multi Brand Lift Slings
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Learn about the Direct Supply Multi-Brand slings, tested by a third party on multiple brands of popular lifts. Healthcare professionals can often spend a lot of time searching for the right sling to use with its corresponding lift. With this new product innovation, your healthcare staff won’t have to worry about spending more budget or time on specific brands of slings for each lift you have.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: New & Improved Atlas Lifts: Senior Living Lifts
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The all new Panacea® Atlas lifts are affordable and versatile for reliable resident and caregiver safety. The Panacea® Atlas medical patient lifts are available in both sit-to-stand and floor lift equipment options. Watch this video to learn more about these new Senior Living lifts!

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Introducing Direct Supply's Wheelchair Anti-Rollback Device
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Discover Direct Supply’s NEW Wheelchair Anti-Rollback Device! The anti rollback device is not only intuitive and quick to install; it’s compatible with most standard wheelchairs. Wheelchairs rolling or moving when seniors are getting in and out of them present dangerous fall risks. Keep seniors safe with our new intuitive and quick-to-install anti-rollback wheelchair device – exclusive to Direct Supply. The anti-rollback wheelchair device is a helpful product for seniors to prevent falls and helpful for healthcare staff to increase efficiency.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Food from the Heart | Senior Living Stories
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Step into the kitchen with Kristy Pinkney, a certified dietary manager who sees every meal as an act of love. For her, cooking isn’t just about food—it’s about bringing joy, comfort, and a sense of family to the wonderful residents she serves every day.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: More Than Maintenance | Senior Living Stories
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Spend a day in the life of Ricky Lee, Larry Nelson and the seniors they serve to see how their work blurs the line between building maintenance and resident care.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Magic of Music in Memory Care | Senior Living Stories
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Witness the power of music as a group of Memory Care residents transforms from passive listeners to a joyful choir. This is Dean Solden’s story of compassion in the face of adversity.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: The Gift of Community | Senior Living Stories
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: For Dr. Sara Hamm of Lifespace Communities, caring for seniors is both her greatest responsibility and greatest joy. Experience her lifelong journey of being a champion for aging adults.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Taking Care to New Heights | Senior Living Stories
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Taught about the importance of caring for his elders at an early age, Jim Tarantino strives to build purposeful communities and create lasting memories for his residents. A partnership with the Ageless Aviation Dreams Foundation allows him to do just that. Go on a dream flight with residents of Capri Senior Communities.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Water Management: DOH Investigation Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: A quick reference to use when a suspected Legionnaires’ disease case is reported. It outlines who to involve, what to gather, and how to work with the Department of Health (DOH) and IWC Innovations—from first notice through documentation.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Explore an assortment of Homecare products from Direct Supply Brands

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Impressions: Transform your space
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Make an impression with trending products for room refreshes and larger renovations. Browse the catalog.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Thank you for purchasing a Direct Supply® Rollator. Please read this entire guide carefully and keep it for future reference.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply Hemi Walker Manual
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Thank you for purchasing a Direct Supply® Hemi Walker. Please read this entire guide carefully and keep it for future reference.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: How TELS Building Services Chose—and Managed—the Right Partner
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Learn how TELS Building Services identified and partnered with a vendor experienced in occupied Senior Living environments to help ensure quality, flexibility, and minimal disruption.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Keeping Residents Comfortable Through Construction
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Discover the steps TELS Building Services took to keep residents informed, safe, and comfortable throughout every phase of construction in an occupied 10-story building.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Minimizing Risk Through Material Planning
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Explore how TELS Building Services kept materials organized, out of the way, and safely stored to help protect residents and staff in an active Senior Living environment.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: From Start to Finish: A Project That Delivered
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Hear final reflections from the TELS Building Services team on what made this project a success—and the lessons they’ll carry forward to future projects.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Legacy Crossings - Project Overview
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Go inside the scope, scale, and strategy behind a 10-floor domestic water pipe replacement—completed on time, on budget, and without disrupting resident life.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Inside the Plan: How TELS Building Services Executed a 10-Floor Domestic Water Pipe Replacement
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: See how TELS coordinated teams, phased work floor by floor, and stayed on track through weekly meetings and on-site oversight.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply Bedspread Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Find the right bedspreads from Direct Supply.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: How to Properly Clean Your Furniture
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The CDC recommends routine cleaning of frequently touched surfaces with household cleaners and EPA-registered disinfectants that are appropriate for the surface. Use these tips to help keep your furniture clean and help prevent the spread of germs in your community.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Oxygen Concentrator Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply offers the industry’s widest selection of oxygen equipment from brands you trust. Our product experts will help you choose the best units for your staff and residents.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Wheelchair Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply offers the widest selection of equipment in the industry. Our expansive portfolio will complete your fleet of wheelchairs, allowing for quick ship solutions or customizable options to fit the needs of all of your residents.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Hard Surface Cleaning Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Learn about the best practices for cleaning hard surfaces

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: PTAC Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Choosing the right PTACs for your community can be more complicated than it seems – daily operating expenses and projected equipment life spans need to be considered as well. Direct Supply is here to help you maximize every dollar, offering up-front selection assistance, ongoing maintenance support and more to keep your units running better for the long haul.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Carpet Care Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This guide outlines the benefits of a four-step carpet floor care model and the best ways to care for your community’s carpets – so your carpet investment can pay off for years into the future..

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Tub Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: A wide variety of bathing solutions to meet the unique needs of your community

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Mattress Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: We're committed to helping those who care for seniors in any setting. Discover specialized solutions tailored to the demands of your unique care environment.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Lift Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This Lift Selection Guide outlines the key considerations that can help you identify the right model for your staff and residents.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Hard Floor Care Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This guide outlines the benefits of a three-step hard floor care model and the ways to best care for your community's floors.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Bed Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This Bed Selection Guide outlines the key considerations that can help you identify the right bed for your staff and residents. And once you’ve identified the exact bed you need, we make it easy for you to place your order with delivery and installation services, budget-friendly financing options, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Period.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Reimagine Dining
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Discover the latest in Senior Living dining trends

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Cambro Food Pan Application Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Cambro food pans are made from commercial food grade, durable materials that maintain their shape without cracking, bending or denting—even under heavy use.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Foodservice Equipment Selection Guide
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Dining is a highlight of a resident's daily life and food is a huge daily operating expense for your operations. That's why it’s critical to find cost-effective ways to offer delicious items – with variety – to keep residents happy and meet budgets.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: CDC Best Practices for Environmental Cleaning in Healthcare Facilities
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This document provides guidance on best practices for environmental cleaning procedures and programs in healthcare facilities in resource-limited settings. It was developed as a collaboration between the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) and the Infection Control Africa Network (ICAN).

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Introducing the NEW Attendant® Touchscreen Vital Signs Monitor
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The future of Attendant Vital Signs Monitors is here with improved features, touchscreen, accuracy and easy to use.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply® Panacea® 3000 Series Adjustable-Height Low Beds
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply’s newest Panacea beds enhance resident comfort, reliability and caregiver ease of use. With features including Auto Contour, optional length/width extensions, synchronized motors and optional staff control, these beds are built to be just what you and your residents need.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply® Panacea® Air Mattress Setup, Sizing and Maintenance
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply Panacea Air Mattresses are renowned for their easy-to-use pressure-reduction systems. This video demonstrates techniques for setting up, sizing, cleaning and maintaining a Panacea air mattress.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Microfiber Training by Direct Supply
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Learn how to properly use Direct Supply® microfiber products to help ensure a cleaner community and longer product life.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: The Panacea® Protector Bedside Mat
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The Panacea Protector Bedside Mat from Direct Supply provides the greatest value in resident safety and protection. It’s so effective, you can even drop an egg on it and the egg won’t break! What’s more, the Direct Supply laboratory team has conducted tests to simulate the weight of a human on the mat and shown just how well your residents will be protected. In addition, the Protector bedside mat comes in two convenient sizes, both of which are fire-retardant, tear-resistant and extra durable.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Attendant® Prodigy Bladder Scanner – Cleaning and Maintenance
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The Attendant Prodigy Bladder Scanner is a fully automated, next-generation bladder scanner – only from Direct Supply. This video will show you how to clean and maintain your device.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Attendant® Prodigy Bladder Scanner – Operation Basics
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The Attendant Prodigy Bladder Scanner is a fully automated, next-generation bladder scanner – only from Direct Supply. This video will show you how to use your device.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Introducing the Attendant® Prodigy Bladder Scanner from Direct Supply
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Finally, a bladder scanner that “just works.” With automatic bladder and anatomy detection, the Attendant Prodigy simplifies the bladder-scanning process like no other product in Senior Living, and staff can be trained quickly. Enjoy wide-angle viewing and accurate readings in just one scan from the durable wireless probe.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Introducing the Direct Supply® Panacea® Tilt & Recline Chair
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Introducing the Direct Supply Panacea Tilt & Recline Chair: the next leap forward in innovation for positioning recliners, exclusively from Direct Supply.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Obtaining a Temperature Reading With Your Direct Supply® Attendant® Connected VSM
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Introducing the NEW Attendant Connected Vital Signs Monitor from Direct Supply! This video will take you through detailed steps showing you how to record a temperature reading with your device, using either an oral or tympanic process.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Checking Oxygen Saturation & Heart Rate with Your Direct Supply® Attendant® Connected VSM
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Introducing the NEW Attendant Connected Vital Signs Monitor from Direct Supply! This video will take you through detailed steps showing you how to record a temperature reading with your device, using either an oral or tympanic process.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Taking Blood Pressure Using Your Direct Supply® Attendant® Connected Vital Signs Monitor
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Introducing the NEW Attendant Connected Vital Signs Monitor from Direct Supply! This video will show you the step-by-step process to accurately take a blood pressure reading using your device.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Setting Up, Servicing & Cleaning Your Direct Supply® Attendant® Connected VSM
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This video shows how to set up your device for general use and take blood pressure, SpO2, and temperature readings. It also covers regular cleaning and servicing to keep your device in top shape.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Promote safety and dignity with Direct Supply’s lift

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Atlas Sit-to-Stand Lift from Direct Supply
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: For residents who demonstrate some weight-bearing ability or upper-body strength.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Discover HYGEN™ Microfiber from Rubbermaid
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Rubbermaid HYGEN microfiber revolutionizes cleaning. But don't take our word for it. Follow Doug, the courageous custodian, as he and the Narrator journey into the wonderful world of microfiber!

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply PTAC: Features And Benefits
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply’s new PTAC features an easy-to-use control panel, a perfect fit into any standard wall sleeve and quiet performance, providing you with peace of mind. Available in a variety of BTU outputs in both Heat Pump and Resistance Heat models, this PTAC is designed to meet your needs.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: How to Use: Direct Supply® Attendant® Bladder Scanner
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Learning to use the Attendant® Bladder Scanner from Direct Supply® is easy, thanks to its intuitive controls, designed specifically for use in Long Term Care.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Direct Supply Panacea 3500 5-Function Adjustable-Height Low Bed
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Direct Supply’s newest bed enhances resident comfort, reliability and caregiver ease of use. With features including comfort chair mode, Auto Contour, integrated length/width extensions, synchronized motors and optional staff control, this bed is built to be just what you and your residents need.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: The Panacea Flip Mattress by Direct Supply
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: We are happy to announce the Direct Supply® Panacea® Flip™ mattress -- a convenient way to cater to your residents' comfort needs. Thanks to its two different foam sides, the Panacea Flip mattress provides two distinct firmness levels. This means you can now use the same mattress type for various comfort needs in your diverse resident community. As its name suggests, the Panacea Flip mattress simply flips over to change its firmness -- an easy task that your caregivers will appreciate. It's never been more convenient to enhance a resident's sleep experience while providing an effective pressure redistribution mattress. Plus, the Panacea Flip mattress is guaranteed with a 5-year warranty, and we'll even let you test one out for free!

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: What do Senior Housing Prospects Really Want: 2023 Senior Housing Survey Results & Analysis
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: The 2023 Senior Housing Surveys were conducted to gather perceptions from both Seniors (prospective residents) and Adult Family Caregivers (participants in the prospective residential decisions for the seniors in their care). The survey results are meant to provide insights for the Senior Living industry and for those developing innovative solutions to meet the needs of these prospective residents in the future. We survey the Adult Caregivers because the industry doesn’t have a lot of data that helps us understand how these adult children/family caregivers impact a senior’s choice on where they live and how they make their decisions.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Understanding The Benefits Of External Cueing, A Direct Supply Webinar
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: In this webinar, attendees will learn the brain mechanism behind external cueing and how it can impact the quality of gait mechanics. We will demonstrate practical cueing techniques to implement in gait training to correct and improve gait abnormalities that arise due to a variety of neurological illness or old age.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: The Best Wheelchair Seat Cushion for Each Resident Video
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Wheelchair seat cushions are an essential part of any transportation setup in Senior Living and Healthcare. While standard sling seats may be acceptable for short-term use, they are not suited for patients to use indefinitely. Augmenting these seats with cushions improves not only patient comfort, but the safety of the wheelchair as well. Wheelchair seat cushions are more than just a comfort seat pad for wheelchair users. The best wheelchair seat cushions are highly resilient and provide patient skin protection and equal pressure distribution for a comfortable wheelchair experience.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Wheelchair Seating & Positioning Techniques to Promote Engagement in LTC, A Direct Supply Webinar
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This webinar will provide the basic clinical information needed to evaluate clients’ seating and positioning needs in a long-term care setting. Clinical data on the evaluation, recommendations, and strategies for working with limited inventory and strategies for advocating for patients will be discussed.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Navigating the Evolving Senior Living Landscape: Insights on 2024 Design Trends Video
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This session is essential for professionals in planning, design, construction, or management of senior living communities. Gain valuable insights to make informed decisions and confidently guide your communities into the future of Senior Living.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: I’m Non-Compliant with California AB 2511; Now What? A Direct Supply Webinar
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This webinar is designed to equip owners, operators & key decision-makers with the knowledge and skills necessary to successfully plan, scope and manage alternate sources of power projects in Skilled Nursing Facilities, specifically to ensure compliance with California’s latest regulations. The session will cover key aspects such as regulatory requirements, project planning and ongoing management strategies. In addition, attendees will learn how to evaluate the needs of their unique community, define requirements for their specific project teams and identify partners with solutions applicable to their needs.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: Find the revolutionary impact of 222nm Far-UVC light on infection prevention in long-term care. Safe, effective solutions for a healthier environment.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Effective Management of Infections, A Direct Supply Webinar
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: In this session, we will examine the events of the 2020 pandemic and the gaps in care delivery that it exposed; exploring the lessons we learned from the past three years and identifying efficiencies that can allow your staff to become more proactive in the planning process and help you prevent, contain and manage infection outbreaks. Participants will learn how new technology can address the latest changes in regulatory language while also making their infection prevention tactics more efficient.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Intro to NFPA 25/Sprinkler Systems Webinar
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: This webinar will entail a high-level overview of NFPA 25, Standard for the Inspection, Testing and Maintenance of Water-Based Fire Protection Systems, as well as a breakdown of most common deficiencies found when inspecting building sprinkler systems. This session will be conducted by Bob Guthrie, who holds a NICET Level III in both Water-Based Fire Protection Systems Layout and Inspection and Testing. Sean McLaughlin, the Director of Fire Protection National Accounts for Cintas (and NFPA 17/17A Technical Committee Member), will present portions of the content as well. Both will be available to field questions at the end of the webinar.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Revolutionizing Healthcare Procurement with AI
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: In this captivating video, we delve into the groundbreaking advancements in healthcare procurement, driven by the power of artificial intelligence (AI). Join us as we explore how Direct Supply® DSSI™ has harnessed the potential of AI to transform the way healthcare procurement operates. Discover how the DSSI solution seamlessly integrates AI into procurement operations, enabling the DSSI consulting team to navigate the complex landscape of healthcare supplies and services with unrivaled efficiency. Witness firsthand how the Direct Supply DSSI proprietary OGM.ai technology has become a game-changer, empowering the team to manage procurement order guides at an unprecedented pace.

coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraltitle: Expert Healthcare Procurement Consulting
coveo:metadata.mgnlcollateraldescription: In this video, we are excited to discuss the procurement consulting solution of Direct Supply® DSSI™. Powered by the cutting-edge DSSI platform, our procurement services offering will turn your procurement into a strategic advantage. If you're in the healthcare industry and looking to optimize your procurement process, you're in the right place!
